__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Swimming Reindeer,Von Neumann Arch.,The Birth of Venus,Riemann Hypothesis
|rank=orange
|amount=4
|category=self
|description=Per 2 ART Master Scrolls used, Snail RUSH +9, ART Master Scrolls Used: 100/100
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by ART Master Scrolls]]
